evidenceFromCrawl: No crawl evidence yet — this is infrastructure-level

Quality target: 'Shopify sync lag: under 60 seconds from Shopify event to LIBBY data update'
Risk: Silent failures mean AI features give bad advice without anyone knowing

failedAttempts.constraint: Geofencing validation is completely broken — employees can clock in from anywhere, violating legal time-tracking compliance requirements
failedAttempts.reason: Geofencing validation constraint is NOT resolved. The constraint requires that POST /api/time-entries/clock-in returns 403 when user is >100m from store, but the codebase provided shows NO geofence validation implementation in the time entries route handler. The crawl verification only checks that pages load (which they do), but does NOT verify the actual geofence enforcement behavior. The re-crawl results show WebSocket connection failures and page load issues, but these are separate from the geofencing constraint. Critical: zero of the 6 planned steps have been completed.

failedAttempts.constraint: Critical database connection failures and missing error handling are causing 500 errors across multiple core endpoints, making the app completely unusable

activeConstraint.description: Multiple critical API endpoints are returning 404 errors, completely breaking core functionality including clock-in/out, scheduling, payroll, and task management
activeConstraint.why: The app's foundation features are completely non-functional. Users cannot clock in, view schedules, access payroll data, or manage tasks. This is a crisis-level constraint blocking all business operations.
unblocks: Employees can clock in/out for shifts
Managers can view and create schedules
Tasks can be assigned and tracked
activeConstraint.goal: Reliability of LIVE features — Clock-in/out, geofencing, scheduling, payroll reports, task assignment, and Clerk auth MUST work flawlessly

steps.description: Create or fix the main route registration file to properly mount all API route modules
successCriteria: All route modules are imported and registered with the Express app

steps.description: Create or fix clock-in/out routes including /api/clock/status, /api/clock/in, and /api/clock/out endpoints
Create or fix schedule management routes including /api/schedules and /api/shifts endpoints
successCriteria: Shift data properly queried from database

steps.description: Create or fix payroll routes including /api/payroll/periods and /api/payroll/reports/current endpoints
successCriteria: Payroll calculations use proper decimal arithmetic

steps.description: Create or fix task management routes including /api/tasks endpoint with CRUD operations
Create or fix employee management routes including /api/employees endpoint
Create or fix activity logging routes including /api/activity-logs endpoint

activeConstraint.completionCriteria: All core API endpoints return 200 status codes instead of 404, and the app's foundation features (clock-in/out, scheduling, payroll, tasks) are functional
